flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Jacksonville State University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.1k → $12.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Jacksonville State University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.8k → $23.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Jacksonville State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Jacksonville State University rose 40% between 2021 and 2024 (25.8% → 35.9%).
